overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas showing the protagonist CJ running along the Santa Maria Beach boardwalk during golden hour. The character passes colorful food stalls and the Yacht Harbor archway before reaching the sandy beachfront, with the ocean visible in the distance.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the boardwalk
green sedan drives past on the parallel road to the left

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wooden boardwalk past food vendors and colorful stalls

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the road parallel to the boardwalk

entered.detail: red and white checkered food stand with illuminated 'PIZZA PIZZA' signage
yellow and red food stall with 'CORN DOGS JUMBO' signage
colorful carnival-style food stand with 'FRIED DOUGH' signage
tall rectangular modern building visible in the distance against the sky
strings of multicolored triangular flags spanning across the boardwalk overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the Santa Maria Beach boardwalk with CJ running past the Pizza Pizza stand. The wooden planks stretch ahead lined with food vendors, while colorful pennant banners flutter overhead. A few pedestrians stroll in the opposite direction and cars pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: yacht harbor entrance with pedestrian plaza

events.description: passing the last food stall, the boardwalk opens toward the Yacht Harbor archway
yellow taxi cab and pickup truck pass by on the left side road

agents.ego_description: continuing to run while weaving past pedestrians on the busy boardwalk approach to the harbor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian dressed in black walking toward the camera on the boardwalk
yellow taxi cab driving along the coastal road

entered.detail: large decorative metal archway with 'YACHT HARBOR' signage spanning the boardwalk entrance
two-story blue building with arched windows and decorative trim
wooden slatted bench facing the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk widens as CJ approaches the Yacht Harbor entrance, marked by a prominent metal archway. The blue harbor building stands on the right while pedestrians and vehicles increase in number. The character weaves through the moderate crowd while maintaining a running pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beachfront with palm trees and ocean view

events.description: passing under the Yacht Harbor arch, the boardwalk transitions to sandy beach
character slows from running to walking as reaching the sand and stairs area

agents.ego_description: slowing to a walk as the boardwalk ends, approaching the sandy beach and concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: woman in swimwear walking up the stairs from the beach

entered.detail: calm sea visible beyond the beach with horizon line
tall wooden lifeguard station on the sand
wide staircase leading down from boardwalk to beach level
row of tall palm trees lining the beachfront path

segments.scene_description: CJ passes under the Yacht Harbor arch and the wooden boardwalk gives way to sand. The ocean becomes visible to the right with a lifeguard tower in the distance. Palm trees line the left side as the character slows to a walk, approaching the concrete stairs leading down to the beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling boardwalk that gradually transitions into an open sandy beachfront. It begins with CJ running past a Pizza Pizza stand and colorful fluttering banners on a wooden walkway lined with food vendors and passing traffic. As the path widens, the scene shifts toward the Yacht Harbor entrance, where the character weaves through an increasing crowd of pedestrians and vehicles beneath a prominent metal archway. The environment then opens up as the wooden planks give way to sand, revealing the ocean to the right and a distant lifeguard tower. Finally, the camera follows CJ past lining palm trees as he slows to a walk and approaches the concrete stairs leading down to the beach.
